coordinate_system.origin: borde de ataque local del ala, eje del motor en y=0

checks.name: motor_span_station
checks.message: Motor placement remains in the reference ATR-like inboard wing region.

checks.name: engine_shell_radial_clearance
checks.message: Minimum preliminary radial clearance between engine envelope and outer loft.

checks.name: propeller_nacelle_radial_clearance
checks.message: Radial separation between the propeller tip and forward nacelle contour.

checks.name: intake_capture_area_geometry
checks.message: Elliptical lip geometry should match the declared capture area within 5%.

checks.name: intake_diffuser_area_ratio
checks.message: Geometric exit-to-capture area ratio matches the declared flowpath target.

checks.name: intake_area_progression
checks.message: The throat contracts the capture streamtube and the downstream duct diffuses again.

checks.name: firewall_aft_of_engine
checks.message: Firewall must remain aft of the preliminary engine envelope.

checks.name: gear_bay_aft_of_firewall
checks.message: The main landing gear bay is separated from the engine/fire zone.

checks.name: nacelle_covers_wing_chord
checks.message: ATR-like gear nacelle extends at least to the local wing trailing edge.
